name: Trappe Tavern
brand_voice: Warm, local, a little dry-humored. No corporate-speak. Signs off 'see you at the bar'. Owner name: Tom.
notes: LEAD with reactivation + missed-call (highest ROI). missed_call_mode: 'text-back' = AI texts back after a ring-out (owner-send); switch to 'voice' to have the AI receptionist answer live so calls are never missed (voice_workflow.py). No POS/booking → Digest estimate-only, Reminders off.
